title: ladanum dubium
intro: Ladanum dubium, also known as the 'Dubious Cistus', is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the Cistus family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Ladanum dubium include wound healing, antimicrobial activity, and potential anti-cancer properties, although more research is needed to confirm the latter. Herbal preparations of Ladanum dubium can be found in the form of essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
